case_title: IN RE: PHIL AAMES PAJAR WONG

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF PUBLICATION (SAN FRANCISCO DAILY JOURNAL) 3/17/2016, 3/24/2016, 3/31/2016, 4/07/2016

NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2016, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR - GRANTED PER WRITTEN DECREE. HEARING NOT REQUIRED. PROOF OF PUBLICATION IN THE CASE FILE. IT APPEARS TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT ALL THE CONTENTIONS IN THE PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME ARE TRUE AND CORRECT, AND THAT THE PETITION SHOULD BE GRANTED. THE COURT GRANTS PETITIONER'S REQUEST TO CHANGE HIS NAME FROM PHIL AMAMES PAJAR WONG TO PHIL AAMES PAJAR. DECREE CHANGING NAME IS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: MEREDITH GRIER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D514).
PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME, RESIDENCY VERIFIED, FILED BY PETITIONER WONG, PHIL AAMES PAJAR JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECREE CHANGING NAME FILED BY PETITIONER WONG, PHIL AAMES PAJAR
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER WONG, PHIL AAMES PAJAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-03-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 514
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER WONG, PHIL AAMES PAJAR
